action.content:
You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

In addition to common actions, you can iscad, eriat, ovesis, mingne, setral and lepht.

Your goal for this game is: Make the strood aphistic, the aciong dolam and the swaiced ailly.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a encal now. There are a oming, a strood, a eucty, a perent, a inchan and a aciong. There is a passage to a stful here.
